creator: yoichi@eken.phys.nagoya-u.ac.jp
text:
kpcal is postscript calendar making tool.
	The patch fixes year 2001 problem and allows
	you to follow Japanese news rule of holidays
	(happy monday rule).

	kpcal-2.0 and kpcal-2.0-HappyMonday.patch follows
	following LICENCE:
	
		Permission is granted to modify and distribute
		this free of charge.
	
	(author Akira TSUCHIYA <tsuchiya@vlsi.kuee.kyoto-u.ac.jp>
	of the patch said that the patch also follows same LICENCE
	as original kpcal-2.0)
